questions.text: Which of these is a non-renewable resource?
questions.explanation: Coal is a fossil fuel and non-renewable. Solar, wind, and hydro energy are renewable resources.
Deforestation leads to decreased rainfall as trees play a crucial role in the water cycle through transpiration.

questions.text: What is the main cause of global warming?
questions.correctAnswer: Increased concentration of greenhouse gases like CO₂ in the atmosphere.
questions.explanation: Global warming is mainly caused by increased greenhouse gases (CO₂, methane, etc.) from burning fossil fuels, deforestation, and industrial activities.

questions.text: The process of planting trees to restore forests is called ________.
questions.explanation: Afforestation is the process of planting trees in areas where there were no forests before, helping restore the environment.
